glosses.hi: मुड़ी हुई तलवार; फेंसिंग की सेबर
glosses.ja: サーベル; フェンシングのサーブル

sentences.target: Je range mon sabre dans le placard.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁɑ̃ʒ mɔ̃ sabʁ dɑ̃ lə plakaʁ/

translations.fr: Je range mon sabre dans le placard.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁɑ̃ʒ mɔ̃ sabʁ dɑ̃ lə plakaʁ/
translations.en: I put my saber away in the closet.
translations.es: Guardo mi sable en el armario.
translations.de: Ich lege meinen Säbel in den Schrank.
translations.yue: 我將軍刀收埋喺衣櫃度。
translations.ru: Я убираю свою саблю в шкаф.
translations.vi: Tôi cất thanh kiếm vào tủ.
translations.nl: Ik leg mijn sabel in de kast.
translations.uk: Я кладу свою шаблю в шафу.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी तलवार अलमारी में रखता हूँ.
translations.el: Βάζω το σπαθί μου στη ντουλάπα.
translations.ja: サーベルをクローゼットにしまう。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, first person singular; marks the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies the following noun to indicate possession.
Common noun, masculine; head of the noun phrase functioning as the direct object.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines the following noun.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition, specifying the location.

sentences.target: Tu peux poser le sabre en plastique.
sentences.reading: /ty pø poze lə sabʁ ɑ̃ plastik/

translations.fr: Tu peux poser le sabre en plastique.
translations.ipa: /ty pø poze lə sabʁ ɑ̃ plastik/
translations.en: You can put the plastic saber down.
translations.es: Puedes dejar el sable de plástico.
translations.it: Puoi appoggiare la sciabola di plastica.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把塑料军刀放下。
translations.pt: Você pode deixar o sabre de plástico.
translations.he: אתה יכול להניח את החרב הפלסטית.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đặt thanh kiếm nhựa xuống.
translations.nl: Je kunt de plastic sabel neerleggen.
translations.hi: तुम प्लास्टिक की तलवार नीचे रख सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να ακουμπήσεις το πλαστικό σπαθί.
translations.nb: Du kan legge fra deg plastsabelen.
translations.sv: Du kan lägga ifrån dig plastsabeln.
translations.ro: Poți pune jos sabia de plastic.
translations.ja: プラスチックのサーベルを置いてもいい。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, second person singular informal.
Modal auxiliary in present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses ability/permission and selects an infinitive.
Main verb in infinitive; complements the modal auxiliary.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines the noun.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of the infinitive verb.
Preposition introducing a material/specification complement.
Common noun used as a material complement after the preposition en.

sentences.target: Son sabre est accroché au mur.

translations.fr: Son sabre est accroché au mur.
translations.en: His saber is hanging on the wall.
translations.es: Su sable está colgado en la pared.
translations.de: Sein Säbel hängt an der Wand.
translations.it: La sua sciabola è appesa al muro.
translations.pt: O sabre dele está pendurado na parede.
translations.vi: Thanh kiếm của anh ấy đang treo trên tường.
translations.nl: Zijn sabel hangt aan de muur.
translations.hu: Аз ő szablyája a falon lóg.
translations.hi: उसकी तलवार दीवार पर टंगी है.
translations.el: Η σπάθη του είναι κρεμασμένη στον τοίχο.
translations.ro: Sabia lui este agățată pe perete.
translations.ja: 彼のサーベルは壁に掛かっている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies the noun to indicate possession.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb used to form the passive; agrees with the subject.
Past participle functioning as the main predicate in a passive construction.
Contraction of the preposition à and the article le; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition indicating location.

sentences.target: Nous regardons des sabres au musée aujourd'hui.
sentences.reading: /nu ʁəgaʁdɔ̃ de sabʁ o myze oʒuʁdɥi/

translations.fr: Nous regardons des sabres au musée aujourd'hui.
translations.ipa: /nu ʁəgaʁdɔ̃ de sabʁ o myze oʒuʁdɥi/
translations.en: We are looking at sabers at the museum today.
translations.es: Hoy estamos viendo sables en el museo.
translations.de: Heute schauen wir uns im Museum Säbel an.
translations.ko: 오늘 우리는 박물관에서 사브르를 보고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我们在博物馆看军刀。
translations.yue: 我哋今日喺博物館睇軍刀。
translations.ru: Сегодня мы рассматриваем сабли в музее.
translations.pt: Hoje estamos vendo sabres no museu.
translations.he: היום אנחנו מסתכלים על חרבות במוזיאון.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi xem các thanh kiếm ở bảo tàng.
translations.ar: اليوم ننظر إلى سيوف في المتحف.
translations.nl: Vandaag bekijken we sabels in het museum.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми розглядаємо шаблі в музеї.
translations.hi: आज हम संग्रहालय में तलवारें देख रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag ser vi på sabler på museet.
translations.id: Hari ini kami melihat pedang di museum.
translations.sv: Idag tittar vi på sablar på museet.
translations.cs: Dnes si v muzeu prohlížíme šavle.
translations.da: I dag kigger vi på sabler på museet.
translations.ja: 今日は博物館でサーベルを見ています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, first person plural.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; describes the action by the subject.
Indefinite plural article; determines a plural count noun.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of the verb.
Contraction of à + le; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition indicating place.
Temporal adverb specifying when the action occurs.

You can put the plastic saber down.

We are looking at sabers at the museum today.
